---
title: ""
page-layout: full
toc: false
listing:
  id: recent-posts
  contents: posts
  sort: "date desc"
  type: grid
  grid-columns: 3
  max-items: 6
  fields: [date, title, description, categories]
  sort-ui: false
  filter-ui: false
---

::: {.hero-banner}
# Hi, I'm Zhanglong 👋 {.unnumbered}

Lecturer in Statistics at Curtin University (EECMS). I work on Bayesian methods, experimental design, and spatial statistics for agriculture — and I build interactive tools that make data easier to use.

[About Me](about.qmd){.btn .btn-hero-primary} [View CV](cv.qmd){.btn .btn-hero} [Projects](projects.qmd){.btn .btn-hero} [Get in Touch](contact.qmd){.btn .btn-hero}
:::

## Featured Interactive Tools {.section-title .unnumbered}

[Practical web apps I built to support researchers and students.]{.section-subtitle style="display:block;"}

::: {.grid}

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-4 .tool-card}
### Open Day Web App Demo

[Play-and-learn decision game]{.tool-tagline}

Data to Decision is a hands-on web demo built for Curtin Open Day 2026. Run a simple ice cream shop, observe outcomes, and learn how statistics and optimisation improve decisions over time.

[Launch live demo →](https://stat-opt-demo.netlify.app/)
:::

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-4 .tool-card}
### MenuMate · AI点菜助手

[AI-powered menu scanner]{.tool-tagline}

Snap a photo of any restaurant menu and get instant personalised recommendations based on your dietary goals, allergies, and group size. Supports 8 languages, with 10 free scans a month.

[Download on the App Store →](https://apps.apple.com/app/ai%E7%82%B9%E8%8F%9C%E5%8A%A9%E6%89%8B-menumate/id6758619316)
:::

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-4 .tool-card}
### Journal Suggester

[Smart journal recommender]{.tool-tagline}

Paste your manuscript's title and abstract to receive ranked journal suggestions using semantic similarity (SciBERT and domain heuristics), plus scope and metrics context to speed up submission decisions.

[Visit journalsuggester.com →](https://journalsuggester.com/)
:::

:::

::: {style="text-align: center; margin-top: 1rem;"}
[More Projects](projects.qmd){.btn .btn-outline-primary}
:::

## Latest Posts {.section-title .unnumbered}

::: {#recent-posts}
:::

::: {style="text-align: center; margin-top: 1.5rem;"}
[View All Posts](posts.qmd){.btn .btn-primary}
:::
